name: Quick Veggie Chili Con Queso
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, combine the crushed tomatoes (undrained), kidney beans (undrained), garbanzo beans (undrained) and pinto beans, tomato paste, diced green chilies (undrained), onions, zucchini, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, sugar, and salt to taste.
2. Heat the mixture until boiling, then reduce heat.
3. Simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the shredded Monterey Jack cheese until melted.
5. Serve with sour cream and garnish with cilantro if desired.
